title: Relics
intro: Relics are powerful passive companions that permanently boost your character's stats once registered. Like Dolls, each activated Relic contributes its stats independently — the more you register, the stronger your character becomes. Relics are considerably more powerful than Dolls and are harder to obtain, requiring pieces from Hard boss Tarot Cards.

figure.alt: Relics collection UI showing all grades and active stat bonuses
figure.caption: The Relics UI — A-grade Relics provide massive combat stat bonuses like P.Atk, Crit Dmg, and PvE Phys Dmg.

obtaining.title: How to Obtain Relics
steps: Kill **Hard Raid Bosses** — they drop Hard Tarot Cards.
Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) → **Tarot Cards** and open your Hard card packs. Bulk opening (x1, x5, x25, x250) is available.
Relic pieces appear directly in your **inventory** after opening the cards.
Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) → **Relics** and register your relic pieces to activate them.

grades.title: Relic Grades
grades.preText: There are **8 grades** of Relics, ranging from the most basic to the most elite. Higher grades require rarer Hard Tarot Card pieces but provide dramatically stronger permanent stats:

leveling.title: Unlocking & Leveling
steps: **Unlock the Relic first** — register the required pieces to activate the Relic slot.
**Level up 10 times** — each Relic can be leveled from 1 to 10 after unlocking.
Each level requires **more Relic pieces** and **more Gold Bars (GB)** than the previous.
Each level increases the Relic's permanent stat contribution to your character.

upgradeFigure.alt: A-grade Relic at Level 4 showing current stats and required upgrade materials
upgradeFigure.caption: An A-grade Relic at Level 4 — stats scale significantly with each level up to the max of 10.

infoBoxes.label: Stack Your Relics
infoBoxes.body: Each *activated* Relic adds its stats independently — registering more Relics stacks the bonuses. Focus on unlocking as many slots as possible before pushing individual Relic levels too high.

infoBoxes.label: Relics vs Dolls
infoBoxes.body: Relics are significantly stronger than **Dolls** but require drops from **Hard Raid Bosses**, making them a mid-to-late game investment. Prioritize Dolls first, then transition to Relics as you progress.
